untranslatable_reason: Head-and-Shoulders inner pattern requires precise identification of dual-head formation, neckline slope geometry, and shoulder symmetry measurements. These structural pattern properties (head lows within 1 month, neckline downslope angle, shoulder proportionality) cannot be reliably expressed using available point-in-time indicators. The pattern detection requires multi-bar historical structure analysis and geometric relationships beyond the scope of indicator-based conditions. Breakout logic converted above, but core pattern validation untranslatable.
